title: Implement Plexus TactusScore runtime wiring
description: Validate TactusScore reasoning_effort/verbosity and pass them into TactusRuntime only when configured.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Started implementation on feature/tactus-score-reasoning-verbosity. Tactus change will be implemented first, then Plexus will pass top-level score settings into TactusRuntime.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented TactusScore validation and runtime wiring for top-level reasoning_effort and verbosity. Targeted TactusScore tests pass, and ruff passes for the changed Plexus files. Dependency pin was not bumped because the new Tactus package version is not published yet; keep that as release follow-up before deployment.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Closing implementation task: Plexus implementation complete. TactusScore validates top-level reasoning_effort/verbosity and passes them into TactusRuntime only when configured. Dependency update follow-up filed as plx-e6bef5.
